trending_themes.evidence: RM flew solo to US in early 2026 to finalize production on ARIRANG. Positioned as primary creative architect of group's post-military return.

trending_themes.theme: Hot 100 as part of full BTS sweep
trending_themes.evidence: Part of historic simultaneous 7-member Hot 100 entry May 2026. Group creative lead also charting individually.

trending_themes.theme: Bottega Veneta and Samsung Art TV ambassadorships
trending_themes.evidence: Maintains luxury brand positioning alongside group activities in 2026. Intellectual artist-as-brand strategy continues.

charting_songs: Right Place Wrong Person (2024, ongoing streams)
notable_movements: Solo US trip to 'set everything' for ARIRANG album

annotation_hooks: RM's Indigo (2022) established him as introspective, museum-visiting, art-referencing lyricist — now his creative direction shapes the entire group's post-military narrative
Bottega Veneta + Samsung partnerships reflect RM's intellectual positioning, distinguishing him from pure performer-idols — parallels sophistication in tracks like 'Mono'
Leadership through production: solo US trip symbolizes responsibility to 'set everything' for collective reunion — the 방탄 (bulletproof) leader metaphor made literal
raw_headlines: RM Jets to US Solo to Set Everything for BTS 2026 Album
RM and BTS Complete Military-Era Solo Sweep on Hot 100
RM Continues Bottega Veneta and Samsung Ambassador Roles in 2026
